log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Aarakocra — Iron Concentration's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Lich's turn ---
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Aarakocra — Iron Concentration's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:18+9=27 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Aarakocra — Iron Concentration.
→ Aarakocra — Iron Concentration: CON save [d20:18+8=26 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 19 necrotic damage (half).
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Aarakocra — Iron Concentration's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:12+9=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Aarakocra — Iron Concentration.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:20+12=32 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 23 fire damage. Aarakocra — Iron Concentration HP: 25/67
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Aarakocra — Iron Concentration's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 0 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:9+9=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Aarakocra — Iron Concentration.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:12+12=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 fire damage. Aarakocra — Iron Concentration HP: 11/67
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Aarakocra — Iron Concentration's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Aarakocra — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Aarakocra — Iron Concentration.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:2+12=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 fire damage. Aarakocra — Iron Concentration HP: -5/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):12+8=20 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 5 rounds ===
